ModMetaData.name: Better Mod Sort
ModMetaData.author: Yan
ModMetaData.description:
[EN]
Ever stared at a wall of red errors wondering which mod broke everything? This mod helps you figure that out.
What it does: - When an error pops up, it tries to tell you which mod caused it (by tracing DLLs, XML defs, textures, patches, etc.) - Saves all errors to a file (BetterModSort.Error.txt) so you can look at them later or share them for help. - Warns you if you accidentally have duplicate mods installed.
Experimental: AI Sorting If you plug in an OpenAI-compatible API key in the mod settings, you can let an AI suggest a better mod load order.
Supports English and Simplified Chinese. Translation contributions welcome!
---
[中文]
红字报错一大堆，到底是哪个 MOD 炸的？
主要功能： - 报错时自动分析来源，告诉你是哪个 MOD 的锅（通过分析 DLL、XML Def、材质、Patch 等）。 - 把所有报错存到文件里（BetterModSort.Error.txt），方便事后翻阅或者发给别人求助。 - 如果你不小心装了重复的 MOD，会提醒你。
实验性功能：AI 排序 在 MOD 设置里填入 OpenAI 兼容的 API Key，就可以让大模型帮你建议更好的加载顺序。
支持简体中文和英文，欢迎贡献其他语言的翻译！
